Bash(cd "D:\\zhq笔记\\gan\\前端开发" && mkdir -p "章节笔记" && python3 -c "
import re, os

with open\('前端工程师成长宝典.md', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Split by chapter headings \(## N. ...\)
# Pattern: line starting with '## N.' where N is 1-11 or 附录
chapters = re.split\(r'\\n\(?=## \\d+\\. \)', content\)

# First part is the preamble \(title, intro, TOC\)
preamble = chapters[0]
chapter_bodies = chapters[1:]

chapter_map = {
    '1. Web开发基础（入门）': '01-Web开发基础.md',
    '2. HTML / CSS / JavaScript 核心三件套': '02-HTML-CSS-JavaScript核心.md',
    '3. 浏览器与网络底层原理（进阶）': '03-浏览器与网络底层原理.md',
    '4. 前端工程化（重点）': '04-前端工程化.md',
    '5. 主流框架（深入）': '05-主流框架.md',
    '6. 前端架构设计（高级）': '06-前端架构设计.md',
    '7. 性能优化（详细）': '07-性能优化.md',
    '8. 前端安全': '08-前端安全.md',
    '9. 全栈能力拓展': '09-全栈能力拓展.md',
    '10. AI + 前端（加分项）': '10-AI+前端.md',
    '11. 实战项目：企业级电商平台': '11-实战项目企业级电商平台.md',
}

for i, chapter in enumerate\(chapter_bodies\):
    # Find which chapter this is
    for key, filename in chapter_map.items\(\):
        if chapter.strip\(\).startswith\(f'## {key}'\):
            filepath = os.path.join\('章节笔记', filename\)
            with open\(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
                f.write\(chapter.lstrip\('\\n'\)\)
            print\(f'Created: {filename} \({len\(chapter\)} chars\)'\)
            break

print\('Done splitting chapters'\)
")

Bash(cd "D:\\zhq笔记\\gan\\前端开发" && mkdir -p "章节笔记" && python -c "
import re, os

with open\('前端工程师成长宝典.md', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Split at chapter boundaries: lines starting with ## followed by digit
parts = re.split\(r'\\n\(?=## \\d+\\. \)', content\)

print\(f'Split into {len\(parts\)} parts'\)
for i, part in enumerate\(parts\):
    # Get first line to identify chapter
    first_line = part.strip\(\).split\('\\n'\)[0]
    print\(f'Part {i}: {first_line[:80]}...'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:\\zhq笔记\\gan\\前端开发\\章节笔记" && python -c "
import re, os

with open\('../前端工程师成长宝典.md', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

parts = re.split\(r'\\n\(?=## \\d+\\. \)', content\)
preamble = parts[0]

# Chapter filenames in order
filenames = [
    '01-Web开发基础.md',
    '02-HTML-CSS-JavaScript核心.md', 
    '03-浏览器与网络底层原理.md',
    '04-前端工程化.md',
    '05-主流框架.md',
    '06-前端架构设计.md',
    '07-性能优化.md',
    '08-前端安全.md',
    '09-全栈能力拓展.md',
    '10-AI+前端.md',
    '11-实战项目企业级电商平台.md',
]

for i, chapter in enumerate\(parts[1:]\):
    if i < len\(filenames\):
        filepath = filenames[i]
        with open\(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
            f.write\(chapter.lstrip\('\\n'\)\)
        print\(f'OK: {filepath}'\)

print\('---'\)
print\('All chapters split successfully'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:\\zhq笔记\\gan\\前端开发" && python -c "
with open\('章节笔记/11-实战项目企业级电商平台.md', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Split at 附录
parts = content.split\('\\n## 附录：学习路线图'\)
if len\(parts\) == 2:
    # Keep chapter 11 content without appendix
    with open\('章节笔记/11-实战项目企业级电商平台.md', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        f.write\(parts[0].rstrip\(\)\)
    
    # Write appendix as separate file
    appendix = '## 附录：学习路线图' + parts[1]
    with open\('章节笔记/附录-学习路线图与总结.md', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        f.write\(appendix.lstrip\(\)\)
    
    print\('Split appendix successfully'\)
    print\(f'Chapter 11: {len\(parts[0]\)} chars'\)
    print\(f'Appendix: {len\(appendix\)} chars'\)
else:
    print\(f'Unexpected split count: {len\(parts\)}'\)
" 2>&1)
